rationale: Pinned 2b4fb8f0 in an absolute /tmp clone and diffed explicitly from 71398a68. Finding A is fully resolved: the dated, spec-wide forward-only addendum expressly supersedes every stale discharge/refutation_discharged/verified-discharge/re-tally reference and accurately matches the shipped self-contained marker, every-path satisfy-from-marker panel_refuted reconciliation, ADR-0037, and consolidated-round-3.md. Finding B is real but not a 114 blocker: 114 explicitly changes mindspec complete; FinalizeEpic is a pre-existing different-verb path reachable after forbidden raw bd close, the scope note does not over-claim, and P1 mindspec-o4fd is the right immediate hardening follow-up. The 41d8e8af..2b4fb8f0 diff has no .go files; build and gofmt passed. Requested panel/complete/cmd tests passed; internal/bead passed except its real-bd integration test, which independently reproduces because this sandbox's bd rejects its own fresh /tmp DB as unsafe, unrelated to the doc-only delta.

findings.issue: Round 1 found that spec.md still described the deleted discharge-by-re-tally mechanism.
findings.resolution: The 2026-07-10 spec-wide addendum unambiguously supersedes all stale discharge language and states the shipped no-discharge contract accurately.

findings.issue: FinalizeEpic can auto-merge bead branches closed through raw bd close without complete's panel gate.
findings.resolution: Accepted as a candidly documented, pre-existing out-of-scope path tracked for immediate P1 hardening in mindspec-o4fd; it does not block the complete-scoped improvement in spec 114.
